title: Agalmyla angiensis
taxonomy: Agalmyla angiensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It belongs to the genus Agalmyla, which is a group of plants commonly known as 'lip orchids' or 'African violet relatives'. The family Gesneriaceae is a large group of flowering plants, often found in tropical and subtropical regions. These plants are known for their unique, often colorful flowers and are widely distributed across the globe. Agalmyla angiensis is native to New Guinea.
